serverInfo.name: Sui Documentation
serverInfo.description: AI-powered Q&A over Sui blockchain documentation. Ask questions about Move programming, Sui architecture, SDK usage, transaction building, and more.

authentication.description: Requires a Kapa API token. Contact docs@mystenlabs.com or visit https://kapa.ai for access.

tools.description: Search and query Sui documentation, ask technical questions, and get AI-generated answers grounded in official docs.
